title: Create OnboardingShell component — full-screen kiosk wrapper with Univisit title and router-outlet
acceptance_criteria: Component fills full screen: 100vw × 100vh, white background, overflow hidden, no scroll
Large centred bold title 'Univisit' at top: 5rem font size, bold, letter-spacing applied
Content area below title contains <router-outlet> filling remaining space with flex column layout, centred
RouterOutlet imported in component imports array
Roboto font loaded via @import in component styles or inline <link> in template
Uses inject() pattern, no constructor injection
No standalone: true in decorator (Angular 21 default)
completion_summary: Created OnboardingShell: full-screen kiosk wrapper with Univisit title, router-outlet, Roboto via SCSS @import, OnPush CD
